lede: We regularly receive enquiries from churches looking for organists, both for occasional services and for permanent positions. We hold a list of contacts available on request for bona fide opportunities. The list does not include details of playing experience beyond any recognised qualifications.

sections.title: Get in touch
sections.body: To request the contact list, please email [enquiries@surreyorganistsassociation.org](mailto:enquiries@surreyorganistsassociation.org).

sections.title: Other options
sections.body:
**Advertise a vacancy.** You can also post organist opportunities on [Organists Online](https://www.organistsonline.org), a national platform widely used by churches.

**Develop your own organist.** If your church is interested in growing an organist from within, our [Organ Student Scheme](/organ-student-scheme/) offers a route in. Students who come through the scheme are usually very loyal and committed to the church that supports them.
